note.fr: Ami intime de <ph id='hume'>Hume</ph>, <ph id='adam-smith'>Smith</ph> prolonge sa morale des sentiments : la <c>sympathie</c> est le ressort du jugement moral. Il la refond toutefois autour du spectateur impartial, tribunal intérieur qui corrige nos partialités.
note.en: A close friend of <ph id='hume'>Hume</ph>, <ph id='adam-smith'>Smith</ph> extends his morality of sentiments: <c>sympathy</c> is the spring of moral judgment. He recasts it, however, around the impartial spectator, an inner tribunal that corrects our partialities.

sources.en: Smith, The Theory of Moral Sentiments (1759)
